title: "My work" column width and filters

posts.author: tjaarto (Tjaart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to change all the column widths in the “My Work” area. Add column filters to the My Work space e.g. status, priority, board. The same filtering capabilities as a standard board (Filter board by anything). Additionally save the different views in “My Work”.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to change all the column widths in the “My Work” area. Add column filters to the My Work space e.g. status, priority, board. The same filtering capabilities as a standard board (Filter board by anything). Additionally save the different views in “My Work”.
